rationale: This is a simple configuration task that creates standard files without complex dependencies

patterns.editorconfig_standard: Use industry-standard EditorConfig for Kotlin/Android projects with 4-space indentation, UTF-8 encoding, and LF line endings
patterns.ktlint_integration: Configure ktlint via .editorconfig properties following Kotlin official style guide
patterns.android_conventions: Follow Android Studio and Kotlin style guide conventions

existing_implementations.description: No existing implementations - this is a greenfield setup

dependencies.note: Task 001 (project scaffolding) and this task can proceed independently

technology_choices.rationale: ktlint is the de facto standard for Kotlin formatting, integrates well with Gradle, and uses .editorconfig for configuration

verification_approach.editorconfig: Verify file exists with correct properties
verification_approach.ktlint_config: Verify ktlint-specific properties are present in .editorconfig
verification_approach.future_integration: Will be integrated with Gradle build in task 001 or later build configuration
